title: hieracium umbrosum subsp. danicum
intro: Hieracium umbrosum subsp. danicum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium umbrosum subsp. danicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be used externally as a poultice or compress to treat skin conditions and wounds.
